title: runtime headless pull-ready complete-work-order lanes
purpose: I3.3 defines runtime headless pull ready complete work order lanes for the agent-driven expert system. Runtime & integration — IDE, SDK, headless, MCP tools.
scope: Owns `I3.3` only; siblings under `I3` must not duplicate this spec.
Aligns with minimal HITL: H1 plan, H2 blocker, H3 sign-off ([INTRO-1.2](INTRO-1.2-human-touchpoint-contract-h1-h2-h3.md)).
Conflicts resolve in favor of [Vision §11 — Branch I — Runtime & integration plane](../../full-automation-vision-and-hierarchy.md#11-branch-i-runtime-integration-plane).
behavior_steps: At H1 plan approval, the conductor stamps goal_id, optional parent_goal, and goal_type into state.json and journal—establishing the identity record every subsequent wake reloads before routing.

On each pursuit wake, preflight reads goal_type to select contracts: milestone goals require manifest gates, feature goals bind task cards and evidence paths, and company_ops goals follow the ops queue.
When parent_goal is set, child pursuits inherit roll-up scope so parallel program streams report status to the parent without duplicating identity fields at each leaf.
The conductor and journal-keeper dual-write any H1 amendments to these fields; S0 scripts refuse progression if goal_id duplicates or parent_goal points to a missing ancestor.
If identity drifts or conflicts—duplicate ids, wrong parent—pursuit halts at H2; evidence must not attach to the wrong scope, and goal verification cannot pass until fields are reconciled.

Edge case `I3.3` variant 3: verify state dual-write before continuing pursuit.
Edge case `I3.3` variant 4: verify state dual-write before continuing pursuit.
Pass 3: add regression test or evidence path specific to `I3.3`.
Pass 3: cross-link related nodes in same branch index.

**False complete:** Item marked done without artifact â†’ audit-hierarchy-depth.py re-enqueues deepen pass.
**Scope bleed:** Worker edits journal/state during planning-only expansion â†’ forbidden in vision-expansion-prompt.
**Stale design:** Upstream vision Â§ changes â†’ reconcile-stale adds deepen items for affected ids.

acceptance: [ ] Named script, skill, or test path exists or is listed in SEC-15 release row
narrative: I3.3 defines runtime headless pull ready complete work order lanes for the agent-driven expert system. Runtime & integration — IDE, SDK, headless, MCP tools. In practice, the system at h1 plan approval, the conductor stamps goal_id, optional parent_goal, and goal_type into state.json and journal—establishing the identity record every subsequent wake reloads before routing, then on each pursuit wake, preflight reads goal_type to select contracts: milestone goals require manifest gates, feature goals bind task cards and evidence paths, and company_ops goals follow the ops queue.
reader_narrative:
<!-- prose-source: agent plane-i 2026-06-28 -->

Headless lane workers pull ready work orders from lane JSON when leases expire or slots open—complete-work-order scripts mark lane progress without IDE conductor presence ([C3.2](C3.2-work-orders-parallel-lanes.md)).

Pull-ready semantics require integration manifest approval and unblocked dependencies in artifact graph ([H3](H3-artifact-graphs.md)). Headless lanes dual-write outcomes to journal/state via S0 scripts only; LLM workers return artifacts to queue for conductor merge.
